name: Japan Industrial Production (METI Indices of Industrial Production)
notes: T2 fallback for FRED JPNPROINDMISMEI (frozen 2024-03). 2026-06-15 fix: the previously-registered statsDataId 0003446463 was NOT the IIP table — getMetaInfo shows it is the Cabinet Office Composite Index of Business Conditions (景気動向指数; stat 00100406; tab=Contributions only). Re-pointed to METI 鉱工業生産・出荷・在庫指数 (stat 00550300) live 2020-base table 0004052177 = 業種別季節調整済指数【月次】付加価値額生産. Slice cdCat01=0001000 (業種別_2020 鉱工業 = Mining & Manufacturing total; SA production index; 2020=100); lang=J required (table absent from the English DB; lang=J passed via the series_id query string overrides fetch_series' default lang=E). Verified 2026-06-15: monthly (median_gap≈31); last obs 2026-03 vs FRED stuck 2024-03. freshness_override_days=60: the DB time-series table carries finals through ~T-3 months (newer 速報 months are file-only), so the latest obs runs ~90-120d old between monthly refreshes; 60 keeps it in STALE rather than EXPIRED, matching the sibling JPN_MACH_ORDERS override.

name: Japan Machinery Orders (Cabinet Office Orders Received for Machinery — private sector ex volatile)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension. 2026-06-15 fix: the previously-registered statsDataId 0003355224 was the ANNUAL fiscal-year Original-Series table (no monthly / no SA) — getMetaInfo: cat02=系列 offered only OriginalSeries and time=Fiscal year, so it resolved a stale annual slice. Re-pointed to the monthly SA sibling 0003355222 = 長期系列 主要需要者別機械受注額(原系列・季調系列、月次), Cabinet Office Machinery Orders (stat 00100401). Slice cdCat01=160 (需要者分類 民間需要(船舶・電力を除く) = private-sector excl. ships & electric power) + cdCat02=100 (系列 季調系列 = seasonally adjusted). Verified 2026-06-15: monthly (median_gap≈31); last obs 2026-03 vs the old annual slice stuck 2025-10.

name: Japan Household Consumption Expenditure (MIC Family Income & Expenditure Survey — two-or-more-person households)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension. MIC Family Income and Expenditure Survey (家計調査) — 用途分類, monthly two-or-more-person households. e-Stat toukei 00200561, statsDataId 0002070001. 2026-07-07 credentialed audit (label-vs-data #2 WRONG-SLICE resolved): pinned the previously-ambiguous slice via getMetaInfo — cdCat01=059 (用途分類 消費支出 = total consumption expenditure headline), cdCat02=03 (世帯区分 二人以上の世帯（2000年～）), cdArea=00000 (全国 nationwide), cdTab=01 (表章項目 金額 — the ONLY 表章項目 code, so this table is a monthly nominal-yen LEVEL, not a real-YoY index). Units corrected "YoY % (real)" -> "JPY per month (nominal)" and name/measure de-"real"-ed to match the only slice the table exposes. Verified live via adapter 2026-07-07: 317 obs 2000-01 -> 2026-05 = 320,345 JPY. Not consumed by any calculator (explorer column). lang=J required (Japanese DB table).

name: Japan Economy Watchers Survey — Current Conditions DI (Cabinet Office)
notes: §3.1.3 Growth axis extension. Cabinet Office Economy Watchers Survey (景気ウォッチャー調査) — 回答者数・構成比及びDIの推移, raw (unadjusted) national table (the SA national headline is Excel-only via stat-search/files). e-Stat toukei 00100001, statsDataId 0003348427. 2026-07-07 credentialed audit (label-vs-data #3 WRONG-SLICE resolved): pinned the DI slice via getMetaInfo — cdTab=140 (表章項目 ＤＩ), cdCat01=100 (判断 合計), cdCat02=100 (景気の現状判断（方向性）= Current Conditions DI, directionality), cdCat03=100 (分野 合計), cdArea=00000 (地域 全国). Verified live via adapter 2026-07-07: 305 obs 2001-01 -> 2026-05 = 43.1. lang=J required (Japanese DB table).

name: Japan CPI (All Items, Index) — Statistics Bureau 2020-base
notes: §2.A A13 tier-0 upgrade (2026-07-09). Statistics Bureau of Japan (MIC) 2020-base Consumer Price Index — 消費者物価指数（2020年基準）, e-Stat toukei 00200573, statsDataId 0003427113. The true PRIMARY for the Japan CPI index level; supersedes the OECD COICOP2018 index mirror (now T1, base 2015=100) in macro_library_dbnomics.csv via the tier merge. Slice pinned via getMetaInfo 2026-07-09: cdTab=1 (表章項目 指数 = index measure; the other measures are 2=前月比・前年比 and 3=前年同月比 YoY), cdCat01=0001 (2020年基準品目 総合 = all-items headline; item dimension has 790 classifications), cdArea=00000 (地域 全国 = nationwide). lang=J required (table absent from the English DB; lang=J in the query string overrides fetch_series' default lang=E). Verified live via adapter 2026-07-09: 733 obs 1970-01 -> 2026-05 = 113.5 (base 2020=100 confirmed; 2020 avg ≈ 100). Correctly ends 2026-05 for the national all-items series — the June 2026 figure visible in the getMetaInfo time dimension is the Tokyo-ward lead cut (cdArea=13A01, published ~1 month ahead); national June releases ~2026-07-19. freshness_override_days=90: national CPI publishes ~3 weeks after month-end, so the latest obs runs ~50-80d old between refreshes; 90 keeps it in a healthy band rather than tripping EXPIRED.
